'''''Resolution''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served under the overall command of then-[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s attempted coup against [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[3 ABY/Legends|shortly before]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was tasked with accompanying the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Grey Wolf]]'' and the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class Star Cruisers]] [[Indomitable (Strike-class)|''Indomitable'']] and [[Triumph (Strike-class)|''Triumph'']] in protecting an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy carrying [[Missile Boat]]s.

The fate of the ''Resolution'' is unknown.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
